title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 80.640 - Trustee in disincorporation — report
text:
80.640.  Trustee in disincorporation — report. — The trustee shall make a report of his proceedings to the county commission at each term thereof.
(RSMo 1939 § 7302) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7151; 1919 § 8600; 1909 § 9488
